name: CyberSecPro
description: WhatsApp Bot Management SaaS — link numbers via pairing codes, manage sessions from a cyberpunk dashboard.

MONGO_URL.description: MongoDB connection string — REQUIRED. Get a FREE cluster at mongodb.com/atlas → Create cluster → Connect → Drivers → copy the URI. Replace <password> with your password. Example: mongodb+srv://admin:mypassword@cluster0.xxxxx.mongodb.net/cybersecpro

JWT_SECRET.description: Secret key for signing JWT auth tokens. Auto-generated — you can leave this blank.

ADMIN_EMAIL.description: Email for the auto-created admin account. Created on first boot.

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for the auto-created admin account (min 6 chars).

NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION.description: Must be false so devDependencies are installed for the React build step.

NPM_CONFIG_LEGACY_PEER_DEPS.description: Use legacy peer deps resolution to avoid install conflicts.
